# The (un)Stable Net

> Weekly briefs on European equities, macro signals, technology and AI by Jacopo Berton — clear, actionable analysis with no noise.

The (un)Stable Net publishes a weekly European market newsletter, long-form articles on markets, tech and AI, plus side projects (the AI Billboard / Million Slots, and GenieLink, a free link-in-bio platform).

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the project and active initiatives.
- [About](/about): Who Jacopo is and what the project is about.
- [Articles](/articles): Latest published articles across markets, tech and AI.
- [Archive](/archive): Full archive of published articles, filterable by year and tag.
- [Newsletter](/newsletter): Weekly European Market Movers newsletter.
- [Subscribe](/subscribe): Sign up for the weekly newsletter.
- [Contribute](/contribute): Submit a guest article or pitch.
- [Resources](/resources): Curated reading list, tools and references.
- [AI Billboard Project](/million-slots): The Million Slots / AI Billboard side project.
- [GenieLink](/genielink): Free link-in-bio platform.

## Optional

- [Terms](/legal/terms): Terms of use.
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy): Privacy policy.
